channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: As AI data centers hit power limits, Peak XV backs Indian startup C2i to fix the bottleneck
item.description: C2i has raised $15 million as it tests a grid-to-GPU approach to reducing power losses in AI data centers.

item.title: Blackstone backs Neysa in up to $1.2B financing as India pushes to build domestic AI infrastructure
item.description: Neysa is targeting deployments of more than 20,000 GPUs over time as demand for local AI compute accelerates.

item.title: This Antioxidant “Wakes Up The Brain” Similar To Exercise
item.description: The astringent sensation caused by flavanols could act as a direct signal to the brain, triggering effects similar to a mild workout.

item.title: The great rotation: Why this fund manager is pivoting from the U.S. toward Europe
item.description: One fund manager with a global mandate is significantly underweight U.S. assets in favor of the opportunities created in Europe by the reshaping of mi...

item.title: Selena Gomez and Benny Blanco Dine at L.A. Hotspot Max and Helen's
item.description: Do even Selena Gomez and Benny Blanco have to wait in line for L.A. hotspot Max and Helen's? The couple were spotted at chef Nancy Silverton and TV pr...

item.title: Nate Diaz Hoping For UFC Return, Wants White House Card
item.description: Nate Diaz has his sights set on kickin' ass on one of the most unexpected stages possible: the White House. The MMA star tells TMZ Sports he’s all-in ...

item.title: Is the stock market open Monday for Presidents Day? Will USPS, FedEx and UPS make deliveries?
item.description: Here’s how trading hours and other services will be affected on the federal holiday, which falls on Monday, Feb. 16, this year.

item.title: How to Support Your Heart Health With 2 Simple Nightly Steps
item.description: According to a new study, it's not what you eat but when.

item.title: African defensetech Terra Industries, founded by two Gen Zers, raises additional $22M in a month
item.description: Terra Industries, the African defense company, announced Monday that it had secured an additional $22 million in funding to further expand the busines...

item.title: Makers Are Building Back Against ICE
item.description: In hacker spaces and at their homes, creative protesters are laser-cutting and 3D-printing tools to resist an occupation.

item.title: J.P. Shay in 'Dumb and Dumber' 'Memba Her?!
item.description: American star Karen Duffy was in her early 30s when she played the killer criminal J.P. Shay -- who is hunting down the briefcase filled with ransom m...

item.title: President's Day Deals on Women's Athleisure
item.description: TMZ may collect a share of sales or other compensation from links on this page. There’s no better time than President's Day to remember our Founding F...

item.title: 7 Science-Backed Ways to Lower Your Blood Pressure Naturally
item.description: No 2. on the list is crucial.

item.title: The Munich conference ended the post-war order, says Ray Dalio. How to invest if great powers collide.
item.description: Protecting wealth in times of war is difficult as normal economic activity is curtailed and governments print money and borrow heavily to fund its mil...

item.title: North West's Neon Takeover With Friends at Alexander Wang in NYC
item.description: North West's future is looking bright and so is her hair. Kim Kardashian and Kanye West's daughter stepped out in NYC rocking a vivid wig while hittin...

item.title: Crypto investors who don’t fill out this new tax form the right way could overpay on their taxes
item.description: Crypto investors can expect to receive a new tax form this year from exchanges such as Coinbase and Robinhood.

item.title: What Happens When Blood Sugar Falls Too Low
The best credit card welcome bonuses of February 2026
item.description: Make sure these elevated and limited-time credit card offers are on your radar this month, or you could end up missing out.

item.title: These nonsmoking hotel guests got charged $500 smoking fees — here's how to avoid it
item.description: TPG’s ombudsman investigates a recent spate of myserious smoking fees caused by faulty smoke sensors in hotel rooms.

item.title: OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger joins OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI said OpenClaw will live on as an open source project.

item.title: Rents are finally falling in some parts of the country. Here’s who is actually feeling the relief.
item.description: Rents fell nationally in January, but they’re still at a high level due to a sharp run-up over the last few years.

item.title: 7 Nutrition Red Flags to Know About
item.description: Feeling unusually tired or noticing subtle changes in hair, nails, mood, or appetite? These signs may indicate nutrition gaps worth discussing with yo...

item.title: 5 reasons to get Chase's Ink Business Preferred Credit Card
item.description: Plenty of benefits make Chase's Ink Business Preferred Credit Card worth considering, from a high welcome bonus to strong coverage for travel and car ...

item.title: This iconic ski-in, ski-out points hotel in Colorado just refreshed its rooms. We took a look inside
item.description: Come with us inside the ski-in, ski-out Park Hyatt Beaver Creek as we check out its renovated rooms.

item.title: Spirit Airlines launches new inflight trading cards
item.description: Spirit Airlines launched a new set of trading cards featuring its historic and current fleet and liveries. The new cards are only available on Spirit ...
